## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Design Engineer role in Client Operations & GTM at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is a unique Silicon Valley startup with agency and build sides, focusing on AI-enhanced quality in marketing and software development](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [The role involves creating landing pages, vibe-coded prototypes, and programmatic SEO templates, balancing aesthetics and code](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Briana's diverse background in design and engineering, coupled with her empathetic approach to client work, aligns well with GrowthX's needs](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI extensively in their workflow, encouraging creative and efficient use of tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and others](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Overview

  - [Dual-sided business: agency and build sides](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Agency side informs client work, build side develops software to enhance operations](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Early-stage startup, still defining operational models and product direction](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Strong design focus due to leadership's design background](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Design team includes marketing designers and design engineers](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Role Description and Expectations

  - [Position: Design Engineer for Client Ops and Go-to-Market](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Tasks: Creating landing pages, vibe-coded prototypes, programmatic SEO templates](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Requires balance of aesthetic skills and coding abilities](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding efficient solutions and prioritizing work effectively](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Opportunity for growth and shaping the role's future direction](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

### Briana's Background and Skills

  - [Diverse experience in marketing, web development, and design](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Self-taught coder with a creative background](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Experience in both technical and community-focused projects](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Strong interest in efficiency and continuous learning](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Desire to grow further as a designer while maintaining technical skills](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### AI Integration in GrowthX Workflow

  - [Extensive use of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Lovable, Bolt)](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Encouragement of creative AI usage for individual work processes](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Standardization of AI prompts for specific content production tasks](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Focus on using AI to scale design skills and guide non-designers](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)

### Remote Work Culture at GrowthX

  - [4-hour overlap with San Francisco for real-time communication](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2540.0)
  - [Primary communication via Slack, with task management in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings and design syncs](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2616.0)
  - [Quarterly in-person gatherings in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2651.0)
  - [Comprehensive onboarding process using Notion documentation](https://fathom.video/share/f3o2yvu6sBS63q_-4uMWFtGNvGKwBSak?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
